name: year
description: Census reference year; for 5-year estimates this is the final year of the 5-year period
observations: Partition column (hive path 'ano=' in staging).

name: period
observations: Values: 1-year, 5-year. Part of the logical key.

name: serialno
observations: Housing-unit/person serial identifier.

name: division
description: Division code based on 2020 Census definitions

name: puma
description: Public use microdata area code (PUMA) based on 2020 Census definition (areas with population of 100,000 or more, use with STATE for unique code)
observations: Geographic code; PUMA vintage varies by year (D6) — no directory FK in v1.

name: region
description: Region code based on 2020 Census definitions

name: state
description: State Code based on 2020 Census definitions

name: adjhsg
description: Adjustment factor for housing dollar amounts (6 implied decimal places)
observations: Adjustment factor with 6 implied decimal places (divide by 1e6).

name: adjinc
description: Adjustment factor for income and earnings dollar amounts (6 implied decimal places)
observations: Adjustment factor with 6 implied decimal places (divide by 1e6).

name: wgtp
observations: Dimensionless statistical replicate weight (no measurement unit).
